use_cases: Sign-up and registration forms requiring styled action buttons
Authentication flows needing destructive, outline, or default button variants
Dashboard CTAs with loading states for async operations
E-commerce checkout and conversion action buttons
Form submission buttons with icon support for visual hierarchy
ai_summary: A flexible button component system with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (sm, default, lg, xl, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Supports loading states, left/right icon slots, and proper keyboard accessibility with focus-visible ring effects. Designed for authentication flows, form submissions, and conversion-oriented UI patterns in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
